rules.name: 检测 NPM 包中的恶意 postinstall 脚本
rules.description: 检测 NPM 包中的恶意 postinstall 脚本
rules.author: security-sample-generator

detection.raw_rule:
// YARA 规则：工具投毒检测
// 版本：1.0
// 日期：2026-03-21
// 覆盖：NPM/Python/Ruby 包投毒

rule NPM_Postinstall_Malicious {
    meta:
        description = "检测 NPM 包中的恶意 postinstall 脚本"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "tool_poisoning"
        mitre_id = "T1195.002"
    
    strings:
        $postinstall = "postinstall" nocase
        $child_process = "child_process" nocase
        $exec_func = /\bexec\b|\bspawn\b|\bexecSync\b|\bspawnSync\b/ nocase
        $curl_bash = /curl[\s\S]{0,50}\|[\s\S]{0,10}ba?sh/i
        $wget_bash = /wget[\s\S]{0,50}\|[\s\S]{0,10}ba?sh/i
        $eval_base64 = /eval[\s]*\([\s]*base64/i
        $npm_lifecycle = "npm_lifecycle_event" nocase
    
    condition:
        ($postinstall and ($child_process or $exec_func)) or
        ($npm_lifecycle and ($curl_bash or $wget_bash)) or
        $eval_base64
}

rule Python_Setup_Malicious {
    meta:
        description = "检测 Python setup.py 中的恶意代码"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "tool_poisoning"
        mitre_id = "T1195.002"
    
    strings:
        $setup_py = "setup.py" nocase
        $os_system = /os\.system\s*\(/
        $subprocess = /subprocess\.(call|run|Popen|check_output)/
        $curl_bash = /curl[\s\S]{0,50}\|[\s\S]{0,10}ba?sh/i
        $eval_exec = /\beval\s*\(|\bexec\s*\(/
        $install_hook = /install|build|egg_info/i
    
    condition:
        ($setup_py or $install_hook) and ($os_system or $subprocess or $eval_exec)
}

rule Ruby_Gem_Malicious {
    meta:
        description = "检测 Ruby Gem 中的恶意扩展"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "tool_poisoning"
        mitre_id = "T1195.002"
    
    strings:
        $extconf = "extconf.rb" nocase
        $gemspec = ".gemspec" nocase
        $backtick = /\`[^\`]+\`/
        $system_call = /\bsystem\s*\(/
        $exec_call = /\bexec\s*\(/
        $curl_wget = /\bcurl\b|\bwget\b/
    
    condition:
        ($extconf or $gemspec) and ($backtick or $system_call or $exec_call) and $curl_wget
}

rule Build_Script_Malicious {
    meta:
        description = "检测构建脚本中的恶意代码"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "tool_poisoning"
        mitre_id = "T1195.002"
    
    strings:
        $makefile = "Makefile" nocase
        $gradle = "build.gradle" nocase
        $maven = "pom.xml" nocase
        $remote_fetch = /curl|wget|fetch|Invoke-WebRequest/i
        $execute = /chmod \+x|\| *sh|\| *bash|\.\/|exec/i
    
    condition:
        ($makefile or $gradle or $maven) and $remote_fetch and $execute
}

rule Typosquatting_Package {
    meta:
        description = "检测拼写错误攻击的包名"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "tool_poisoning"
        mitre_id = "T1195.002"
    
    strings:
        // 常见流行包的拼写错误变体
        $lodash_typo = /l0dash|1odash|lodahs|lodah/i
        $underscore_typo = /undersc0re|underscOre|underscor/i
        $request_typo = /reqeust|reques|requset|reqest/i
        $express_typo = /expres|expres|exprss|expresss/i
    
    condition:
        $lodash_typo or $underscore_typo or $request_typo or $express_typo
}
